title: 10 best herbal creams for chills
description: Matricaria chamomilla, also known as chamomile, creams helps with chills because of its soothing and anti-inflammatory properties. The active ingredients in chamomile creams, such as apigenin and luteolin, help to calm the body's nervous system, reducing muscle tension and promoting relaxation. This can help to alleviate chills and fever by reducing the body's stress response and promoting a sense of calm and well-being. Additionally, chamomile's antispasmodic properties can help to re...
